name: Lentil & Mushroom Soup

ingredients.item: green or brown lentils (not French lentilles de Puy)
Sea salt and freshly ground pepper
In a large pot, combine the lentils, stock, onion, carrots, celery, garlic, bay leaves, tomato sauce, olive oil, and salt to taste.
Cover partially and bring to a simmer over medium heat. Simmer for about 15 minutes, then add the mushrooms.
Continue simmering until the lentils and vegetables are soft, about 45 minutes longer.
Let cool for 10 minutes, then add several grinds of pepper and more salt if necessary. Remove the bay leaves. Ladle into bowls to serve.
